requirement_topic.en: EDL / LCEC Grid-Interactive Solar Context — Anti-Islanding, 220/380 V 50 Hz Settings, and Lebanon's Hybrid Reality
requirement_topic.zh: EDL / LCEC并网互动太阳能背景——防孤岛、220/380 V 50 Hz参数及黎巴嫩混合系统现实
requirement_topic.zht: EDL / LCEC併網互動太陽能背景——防孤島、220/380 V 50 Hz參數及黎巴嫩混合系統現實

summary.en: Lebanon's public electricity system is operated by EDL, with LCEC acting as the national technical energy center for renewable-energy policy, programmes, and publications. Grid-interactive or net-metered PV inverter projects should be prepared around Lebanon's 220/380 V, 50 Hz supply context, EDL interconnection review, and LCEC net-metering / solar guidance where applicable. For inverter evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface test reports are the relevant IEC references for grid-interactive equipment. The practical context is unusual: because EDL supply has been highly constrained, many Lebanese rooftop solar projects are private off-grid or hybrid solar-plus-battery systems that may not proceed through a formal EDL net-metering approval. For those projects, grid-code approval may be less central than installer engineering, transfer-switch / backup configuration, battery-system safety, importer due diligence, and project-owner requirements.
summary.zh: 黎巴嫩公共电力系统由EDL运营，LCEC作为国家层面的可再生能源政策、项目和出版物技术能源中心。并网互动或净计量光伏逆变器项目应围绕黎巴嫩220/380 V、50 Hz供电背景、EDL接入审查以及适用时的LCEC净计量/太阳能指引准备资料。逆变器证据方面，IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口测试报告是并网互动设备的相关IEC参考。实际背景较特殊：由于EDL供电长期高度受限，许多黎巴嫩屋顶光伏项目为私人离网或太阳能加电池混合系统，可能不会走正式EDL净计量批准。在这些项目中，并网规范审批的重要性可能低于安装商工程设计、转换开关/备用电源配置、电池系统安全、进口商尽调及项目业主要求。
summary.zht: 黎巴嫩公共電力系統由EDL營運，LCEC作為國家層面的再生能源政策、項目和出版物技術能源中心。併網互動或淨計量光伏逆變器項目應圍繞黎巴嫩220/380 V、50 Hz供電背景、EDL接入審查以及適用時的LCEC淨計量/太陽能指引準備資料。逆變器證據方面，IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面測試報告是併網互動設備的相關IEC參考。實際背景較特殊：由於EDL供電長期高度受限，許多黎巴嫩屋頂光伏項目為私人離網或太陽能加電池混合系統，可能不會走正式EDL淨計量批准。在這些項目中，併網規範審批的重要性可能低於安裝商工程設計、轉換開關/備用電源配置、電池系統安全、進口商盡調及項目業主要求。

standards_or_laws: EDL grid / distribution interconnection requirements for projects connected to the public network
LCEC solar and net-metering guidance where a formal net-metered project is pursued
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Lebanon low-voltage supply context: 220/380 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power station connection, NB/T 32004 for photovoltaic grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for photovoltaic grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding / grid-support tests. These China-side documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and approval practice. They do not automatically satisfy EDL / LCEC project review, LIBNOR conformity expectations, or private Lebanese project-owner requirements.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求，以及国内防孤岛/电网支撑测试。这些中国侧文件基于中国电网条件和审批实践，不会自动满足EDL / LCEC项目审查、LIBNOR合格评定预期或黎巴嫩私人项目业主要求。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求，以及國內防孤島/電網支撐測試。這些中國側文件基於中國電網條件和審批實務，不會自動滿足EDL / LCEC項目審查、LIBNOR合格評定預期或黎巴嫩私人項目業主要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid evidence should be treated as baseline engineering evidence only. For grid-interactive Lebanon projects, prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, country-parameter setting records for 220/380 V at 50 Hz, and project-specific EDL / LCEC documentation where net metering or public-grid connection is pursued. For the dominant off-grid / hybrid use case, document whether the inverter is operated in non-export, backup, or grid-interactive mode, and keep installer commissioning records, protection settings, battery compatibility, and importer declarations because formal EDL net-metering approval may not be the operative gate.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据只能视为基础工程证据。对于黎巴嫩并网互动项目，应准备IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、220/380 V 50 Hz国家参数设置记录，以及适用净计量或公共电网接入时的EDL / LCEC项目文件。对于占主导的离网/混合用途，应记录逆变器是否以不反送电、备用电源或并网互动模式运行，并保存安装调试记录、保护设置、电池兼容性和进口商声明，因为正式EDL净计量批准未必是实际门槛。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據只能視為基礎工程證據。對於黎巴嫩併網互動項目，應準備IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、220/380 V 50 Hz國家參數設置記錄，以及適用淨計量或公共電網接入時的EDL / LCEC項目文件。對於占主導的離網/混合用途，應記錄逆變器是否以不反送電、備用電源或併網互動模式運行，並保存安裝調試記錄、保護設置、電池相容性和進口商聲明，因為正式EDL淨計量批准未必是實際門檻。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific: mandatory where EDL public-grid connection or LCEC / EDL net-metering review applies; for private off-grid / hybrid systems, practical due diligence and contractual requirements may dominate over formal utility approval
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies Chinese grid operator or certification expectations only and is not transferable as Lebanon EDL / LCEC acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a China grid certificate is sufficient for Lebanon. If the inverter will interact with the EDL grid or a net-metering arrangement, prepare IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence and validate 220/380 V, 50 Hz settings. If the project is off-grid or hybrid because of constrained EDL supply, document the non-export / backup design, installer commissioning, battery interface, and importer due diligence instead of treating formal net metering as the only compliance gate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要假设中国并网证书足以用于黎巴嫩。如果逆变器将与EDL电网或净计量安排互动，应准备IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据，并验证220/380 V、50 Hz参数。如果项目因EDL供电受限而采用离网或混合设计，应记录不反送电/备用电源设计、安装调试、电池接口及进口商尽调，而不是将正式净计量视为唯一合规门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不要假設中國併網證書足以用於黎巴嫩。如果逆變器將與EDL電網或淨計量安排互動，應準備IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據，並驗證220/380 V、50 Hz參數。如果項目因EDL供電受限而採用離網或混合設計，應記錄不反送電/備用電源設計、安裝調試、電池介面及進口商盡調，而不是將正式淨計量視為唯一合規門檻。

requirement_topic.en: LCEC Solar / Net-Metering Route — Project Gate Separate from Import Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: LCEC太阳能/净计量路径——独立于进口合格评定的项目门槛
requirement_topic.zht: LCEC太陽能/淨計量路徑——獨立於進口合格評定的項目門檻

summary.en: LCEC publishes Lebanon renewable-energy information and maintains solar-sector programmes, publications, and recommended-company information. Where a PV inverter is supplied for a formal net-metering or grid-interactive project, LCEC / EDL project requirements should be treated as a separate project gate from customs entry or LIBNOR conformity. Equipment evidence should connect the exact inverter model, firmware settings, anti-islanding mode, and installer responsibilities to the project submission. For private rooftop systems installed primarily to compensate for poor grid availability, the evidence package should still preserve IEC safety, grid-interaction, EMC, battery, and installation records even where no formal EDL net-metering file exists.
summary.zh: LCEC发布黎巴嫩可再生能源信息，并维护太阳能领域项目、出版物和推荐公司信息。若光伏逆变器用于正式净计量或并网互动项目，应将LCEC / EDL项目要求视为独立于海关进口或LIBNOR合格评定的项目门槛。设备证据应把具体逆变器型号、固件设置、防孤岛模式和安装商责任关联到项目提交文件。对于主要为弥补电网供电不足而安装的私人屋顶系统，即使没有正式EDL净计量文件，也应保存IEC安全、并网互动、EMC、电池和安装记录。
summary.zht: LCEC發布黎巴嫩再生能源資訊，並維護太陽能領域項目、出版物和推薦公司資訊。若光伏逆變器用於正式淨計量或併網互動項目，應將LCEC / EDL項目要求視為獨立於海關進口或LIBNOR合格評定的項目門檻。設備證據應把具體逆變器型號、韌體設置、防孤島模式和安裝商責任關聯到項目提交文件。對於主要為彌補電網供電不足而安裝的私人屋頂系統，即使沒有正式EDL淨計量文件，也應保存IEC安全、併網互動、EMC、電池和安裝記錄。

standards_or_laws: LCEC solar and renewable-energy publications / programmes
EDL net-metering or public-grid interconnection rules where applicable
IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 as common evidence for grid-interactive PV inverters
Project owner, insurer, EPC, and installer requirements for private hybrid systems

summary.en: China has domestic distributed-PV connection rules, grid-company review processes, and GB/T / NB/T inverter evidence. Those Chinese processes do not create eligibility for LCEC / EDL net-metering or Lebanese project acceptance. They may be useful as engineering background only if mapped to IEC reports and Lebanon-specific settings.
summary.zh: 中国有国内分布式光伏接入规则、电网公司审查流程及GB/T / NB/T逆变器证据。这些中国流程不会形成LCEC / EDL净计量或黎巴嫩项目接受资格；只有在映射到IEC报告和黎巴嫩特定参数后，才可作为工程背景材料。
summary.zht: 中國有國內分散式光伏接入規則、電網公司審查流程及GB/T / NB/T逆變器證據。這些中國流程不會形成LCEC / EDL淨計量或黎巴嫩項目接受資格；只有在映射到IEC報告和黎巴嫩特定參數後，才可作為工程背景材料。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: LCEC / EDL project evidence is not replaced by China distributed-PV approvals. Confirm the current route with the Lebanese installer, project owner, and, where applicable, LCEC / EDL before shipment. Keep a model-level evidence pack: IEC 62109 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 grid-interface, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC, country settings, labels, manuals, battery-compatibility notes, and commissioning records.
gap.zh: 差距：LCEC / EDL项目证据不能由中国分布式光伏批准替代。出货前应与黎巴嫩安装商、项目业主以及适用时的LCEC / EDL确认当前路径。应保存型号级证据包：IEC 62109安全、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC、国家参数、标签、说明书、电池兼容性说明及调试记录。
gap.zht: 差距：LCEC / EDL項目證據不能由中國分散式光伏批准替代。出貨前應與黎巴嫩安裝商、項目業主以及適用時的LCEC / EDL確認當前路徑。應保存型號級證據包：IEC 62109安全、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC、國家參數、標籤、說明書、電池相容性說明及調試記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where the project seeks LCEC / EDL net-metering or public-grid interconnection; otherwise often contractual, insurer, installer, or importer due diligence for private off-grid / hybrid installations
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic distributed-PV approvals and GB/T / NB/T files are not transferable to Lebanon

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat LCEC / EDL net-metering or grid-interactive review as a Lebanon project gate, not an automatic consequence of China-side PV approval. For off-grid and hybrid rooftop systems, preserve the same IEC safety, grid-interaction, EMC, battery, and commissioning evidence because importer, installer, insurer, and owner due diligence may be the real approval path.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将LCEC / EDL净计量或并网互动审查视为黎巴嫩项目门槛，而非中国侧光伏批准的自动结果。对于离网和混合屋顶系统，也应保存同样的IEC安全、并网互动、EMC、电池及调试证据，因为进口商、安装商、保险方和业主尽调可能才是实际批准路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將LCEC / EDL淨計量或併網互動審查視為黎巴嫩項目門檻，而非中國側光伏批准的自動結果。對於離網和混合屋頂系統，也應保存同樣的IEC安全、併網互動、EMC、電池及調試證據，因為進口商、安裝商、保險方和業主盡調可能才是實際批准路徑。
